address.address: Bhulabhai Desai Road , Mumbai, Maharashtra India

pos_sentences.text: There is a very big library and accessible anytime a person can go to the library I had a lot of book and lot of information you can get any book from the library
pos_sentences.name: Antheia Tapi

pos_sentences.text: Welcoming, Engaging, Non-Judgmental, Empowering, Always bringing new opportunities and events to participate in
pos_sentences.name: Marisa Daulagupu

pos_sentences.text: The chemscope fest organization and it's execution
pos_sentences.name: Sweta Rani Sharma

pos_sentences.text: Different cultural activities and college day celebration
pos_sentences.name: Sweta Rani Sharma

pos_sentences.text: The botanical garden makes college a safe space
pos_sentences.name: Suzanne Dsouza

pos_sentences.text: The staff is very friendly and teaches us to be respectful to everyone arounf
pos_sentences.name: Suzanne Dsouza

pos_sentences.text: The variety of clubs you can join!! 16+ clubs including dance, art, music, science that offer limitless opportunities.
pos_sentences.name: Qareena Bamne

pos_sentences.text: Attention to detail by all the professors and constant encouragement to get involved in class discussions.
pos_sentences.name: Qareena Bamne

pos_sentences.text: The faculty good interactions with them and a friend relation
pos_sentences.name: Antheia Tapi

pos_sentences.text: The campus of the college has a lot of events the lord of club enjoy that club
pos_sentences.name: Antheia Tapi

neg_sentences.text: The lecture timings were quite hectic and practicals used to hectic as well
neg_sentences.name: Sweta Rani Sharma

neg_sentences.text: The canteen can be improvised with space
neg_sentences.name: Suzanne Dsouza

neg_sentences.text: Not enough healthy food options in the canteen. There are a few, but not enough.
neg_sentences.name: Qareena Bamne

neg_sentences.text: Needs more fans in the corridors. It gets hot sometimes

neg_sentences.text: The admin department has too much strict type

neg_sentences.text: Problem with the college fans and while the event in college problem in the canteen to sit

neg_sentences.text: Washrooms are not clean and sometimes left dirty

neg_sentences.text: Too many mosquitoes due to too many plants in the campus
